commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=23eac4d15590c811a5e4dd82e4ec0a48e5aea096)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `ensureAgentWorkspace` skip SOUL, IDENTITY, USER, and HEARTBEAT creation whenever the target workspace is not brand new, and updates workspace tests for that behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can pass a spawned workspace override into `agent-command`, which then calls `ensureAgentWorkspace` on that path before state checks. I did not run a live Telegram/subagent reproduction.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor or maintainer repair of the fix shape plus real behavior proof; automation should not merge or patch over the workspace policy boundary without review.

target.title: fix(agents): do not recreate optional bootstrap files in existing workspaces (#83593)
target.body:
## Summary

`ensureAgentWorkspace` computed `isBrandNewWorkspace` (true only when the workspace directory contains none of: AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md, HEARTBEAT.md, `memory/`, `.git`, or a root MEMORY.md) but only used it for `ensureGitRepo`. Optional bootstrap files — SOUL.md, USER.md, HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md — were written via `writeFileIfMissing` on every call regardless of workspace state, so files intentionally removed from a workspace root were recreated from templates on the next subagent spawn.

The fix gates optional file creation on `isBrandNewWorkspace`. Required files (AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md) are always ensured and are unaffected. Closes #83593.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: optional bootstrap files recreated in workspace root after intentional removal when a subagent spawns

Real environment tested: vitest unit suite — regression test sets up the exact reporter scenario (AGENTS.md + `.git` present, optional files absent) and asserts none are created after `ensureAgentWorkspace`

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/agents/workspace.test.ts` — 56 tests passed

Evidence after fix: new test `does not recreate optional bootstrap files removed from an initialized workspace (#83593)` — all four optional filenames verified absent after call; AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md verified present

Observed result after fix: SOUL.md, USER.md, HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md not created; AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md present

What was not tested: live subagent spawn in a configured workspace (test covers `ensureAgentWorkspace` directly, which is the call site in `agent-command.ts:434`)
target.author: martingarramon
